name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement to the CLI, reports, policy or Go packages
title: "Feature: "

---

## Use case

Describe the workflow or problem this would improve.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the output, flag, report field, policy check or package API you would
expect.

## Alternatives

Mention any workaround you currently use.

## Compatibility notes

Would this need a new CLI flag, JSON field, policy check name or public Go API?
